raw_consumer_statement:
I booked a hotel in XXXX CA from XX/XX/XXXX until XX/XX/2024. They lost power for over 3 days and kept insisting the power would be back on shortly so I stayed instead of going to a new hotel. Without power I could not use refrigerator ( and I lost items I had in there ), no microwave, no internet to do my job, etc. 

I contacted the management at the hotel about getting a credit for XXXX days ( of the XXXX I stayed for these issues ) which is {$160.00} of the total bill of {$750.00}. They have never responded. Therefore I asked Citi to get involved ( I paid using their Mastercard ). 

They looked at my dispute and determined it was a " quality '' issue which they said they can not help with. I strongly disagree! I could not use the room I paid for! I did not get the services they promised to me. 

So, I am writing asking you to take a look at the issue to see if you can help. 

Thank you very much.
